data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Instagram offers two-factor authentication to add an extra layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports authentication apps and SMS-based verification for user login.

data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: A robust system to detect and manage inappropriate content, enhancing user safety.
data.technical_spec: Uses AI-driven algorithms and manual reviews for content flagging.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Data in transit is encrypted to protect user information from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS (Transport Layer Security) is implemented for data encryption.

data.title: Anomaly Detection
data.description: Implementation of systems to detect unusual activities, preventing unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models analyze patterns and flag suspicious activities.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages external security researchers to identify and report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Offers rewards for validated vulnerabilities that align with outlined terms.
